mapper.insert:
insert into trainsclass (trainsClassName, startDate, endDate, trainsInfoId,amount,position) values
(#{c.trainsClassName},#{c.startDate},#{c.endDate},#{c.trainsInfoId},#{c.amount},#{c.position})
insert into trainsclass (trainsClassName, startDate, endDate, trainsInfoId,amount,position) values (#{trainsClassName},#{startDate},#{endDate},#{trainsInfoId},#{amount},#{position})
mapper.update:
update trainsclass
trainsClassName = #{trainsClassName},
startDate = #{startDate},
endDate = #{endDate},
amount = #{amount},
position = #{position},
where trainsClassId = #{trainsClassId}
mapper.select: select trainsClassId from trainsclass where trainsInfoId = (select trainsInfoId from trainsclass where trainsClassId = #{id})
select c.trainsClassName,i.trainsName,c.count from trainsclass c left join trainsinfo i on c.trainsInfoId = i.trainsId where c.trainsInfoId = #{trainClassId}

select trainsClassId, trainsClassName, startDate, endDate, trainsInfoId,amount,position, (select count(*) from studentcertificate where studentcertificate.trainsClassId = t.trainsClassId) count from trainsclass t where trainsInfoId = #{id}

select i.*,c.trainsClassId,c.trainsClassName,c.startDate,c.endDate,c.amount,c.position, (select count(*) from studentcertificate where studentcertificate.trainsClassId = c.trainsClassId) as count from trainsclass c join trainsinfo i on c.trainsInfoId = i.trainsId
